summary: iter179 testing complete - EchoConciergeMobile + Outlook Sync Scaffolding fully working. Backend: 24/24 tests passed. Frontend: Mobile companion page renders correctly with all UI elements (tier pill, celebration banner, quick chips, freeform input). Outlook sync returns 503 gracefully when not configured. Regressions: iter178 sign-in pill visible, iter177 Job Profiles tab works, iter175 MySchedule panel loads.

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_iter179 and TEST_playwright_iter179 prefixed requests during testing via mobile companion.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter179 adds EchoConciergeMobile (guest-facing mobile companion at /m/concierge/:token) and Outlook Sync scaffolding. Mobile endpoints: POST /api/concierge-mobile/mint (admin-gated), GET /api/concierge-mobile/resolve/{token}, POST /api/concierge-mobile/request, POST /api/concierge-mobile/preference. Outlook endpoints return 503 when AZURE_CLIENT_ID/SECRET not set. Frontend uses 420px mobile viewport. All data-testid attributes present: concierge-mobile-root, mobile-tier-pill, mobile-celebration-banner, mobile-quick-{kind}, mobile-freeform-input, mobile-freeform-submit.

mocked_apis.note: Microsoft Graph endpoints are NOT mocked - the scaffold's 503 handling is being validated. Emergent OAuth unchanged.
